general.note: New Mount: Scrapper Mad Axe Mono Wheel.
Respawn timers reduced in the mid-to-late game; by level 22, respawns are back to 65 seconds.
Updated home screen and startup music.

notes: Original map returns to Custom Games under this name (distinct from current Garden of Terror).
Returns to Quick Match.
Mine Golem drops 10 extra Skulls over its life; objective completes at 55 Skulls (not 100).
Hero vision is reduced in the mines.
Nuke cast time 2.5s → 3s; casting breaks on taking damage.
Nuke DoT damage +100%.
Nuke damage to Forts/Keeps 100% → 125%.

heroes.name: Arthas
notes: Full rework — new Death Coil (damage or self-heal), Howling Blast, Frozen Tempest (stacking slows), charge-based Army of the Dead, Sindragosa heroic, and questing Frostmourne Hungers (D).
Full talent tree replaced.

heroes.name: Chen
notes: Keg Smash / Breath of Fire tuning (Breath initial damage down, duration up, no Energy cost; Keg Smash cost up).
Fortifying Brew briefly blocks extra commands.
Talent reshuffle: Accumulating Flames to 1 with reworked quest/Mythic, Eye of the Tiger to 4, Elusive Brawler move-speed nerf, Wandering Keg CD up, Pressure Point slow duration up.

heroes.name: Deathwing
notes: Onslaught cooldown 5s → 6s; Dragonflight 15s → 20s.
Gaze onto Destruction duration 5s → 3.5s.

heroes.name: Falstad
notes: Frequent Flyer kill-credit range 14 → 8.5.

heroes.name: Garrosh
notes: Wrecking Ball range and search range reduced.
Unrivaled Strength ranged bonus 20% → 15%.

heroes.name: Gazlowe
notes: Rock-It! Turret health up (510 → 600), decay over 20s (was 17).
Robo-Goblin DPS 90 → 100.

heroes.name: Mal'Ganis
notes: Necrotic Embrace — double Vampiric Touch benefit, 15 Spell Armor (was 25 Armor), damage up.
Will of Tichondrius / Vampiric Aura / Fueled by Torment / Might of Sargeras level and effect changes.

heroes.name: Medivh
notes: Winds of Celerity and Raven's Intellect buffed; Raven Familiar slow reduced.
Force of Magic spell power up; Circle of Protection no longer increases Force of Will CD.
Guardian of Tirisfal also +50% Arcane Rift range.

heroes.name: Muradin
notes: Storm Bolt grants 5 stacks if the target dies within 3s of a hit; pierce quest threshold 40 → 45.
Dwarf Launch CD reduction per hit 2s → 1s.

heroes.name: Sgt. Hammer
notes: Maelstrom Rounds damage bonus 30% → 40%.
Hyper-Cooling Engines / Ultra-Capacitors: CD reduction from Structures instead of splash.
Advanced Lava Strike damage bonus 50% → 65%.

heroes.name: Thrall
notes: Crash Lightning — fewer stacks lost on death.
Echo of the Elements — longer kill window, higher stack thresholds, second reward no longer adds a bounce; other tuning.
Rolling Thunder now grants an extra Chain Lightning bounce.

heroes.name: Tyrande
notes: Lunar Flare — stack on kill within 3s, Mythic also grants +1 attack range, Hero-hit damage tuning.
Quickening Blessing move bonus up.
Commander of Sentinels no longer increases Sentinel cooldown (vs. PTR).

general: Unstoppable targets are now correctly immune to Blinds.

notes: Bosses no longer prioritize attacking summoned units.
AI coin turn-in fix.
Minion pathing fix near Punisher beams.

heroes.name: D.Va
notes: Defense Matrix AI retargeting fix.

heroes.name: Deathwing
notes: Dragonflight cooldown-on-damage rule fix.

heroes.name: Garrosh
notes: In For the Kill fix.

heroes.name: Gul'dan
notes: Drain Life interrupt fix.

heroes.name: Jaina
notes: Improved Ice Block / AI fixes.

heroes.name: Kael'thas
notes: Rebirth AI fix.

heroes.name: Li Li
notes: Cloud Serpent Fog of War visibility fix.

heroes.name: Medivh
notes: Poly Bomb AI fix.

heroes.name: Nazeebo
notes: Superstition Corpse Spider display fix.

heroes.name: Samuro
notes: Mirror Image movement/AI fixes.

heroes.name: Stukov
notes: Weighted Pustule vs. slow removal fix.

heroes.name: Thrall
notes: Feral Spirit extension fix.
